case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. KAIYA WANG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,232.34 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, KAI-YU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-23-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, KAI-YU

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, WHO CORRECTS THE SPELLING OF HER NAME IN OPEN COURT TO KAI-YU WANG. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-31-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE CONTINUED FOR 3 MONTHS. MEDIATED DISPOSITION - DEFENDANT TO PAY $445.00 OVER 6 MONTHS. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-01-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT 1/31/12. NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
